title: Vehicle Stability Assist (VSA) system structure description - Engine drag control control

blocks.text: Vehicle Stability Assist (VSA) system structure description - Engine drag control control

When shifting gears while driving on a slippery road surface, the engine drag torque causes the wheels to slip and the vehicle becomes unstable. To avoid such a situation, the engine drag control control system requests the PGM-FI ECU to increase torque to eliminate slippage when it detects wheel slippage due to engine drag torque.
